Dashboard.title: My Resumes
Dashboard.subtitle: Manage your CVs and create new ones
Dashboard.limitMsg: You have reached the limit of 4 free CVs. You will soon be able to access more via subscription.
Dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this CV? This action cannot be undone.

LandingPage.heroSubtitle: Our AI-powered tool will layout your CV in real time with a professional design, highlighting the best of you.
LandingPage.featuresSubtitle: All the power of a professional designer, simplified in an intuitive interface.
LandingPage.f1Desc: Instantly preview every change. Adjust typography, colors, and spacing without reloading the page.
LandingPage.f2Desc: Generate impactful summaries and descriptions with a single click.
LandingPage.f3Desc: PDFs optimized for ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems), in perfect A4 format.
LandingPage.f4Desc: Fast, fluid, and secure application. Your information is automatically saved in the cloud.
LandingPage.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to land your dream job.
LandingPage.step1Desc: Enter your details, experience, and education in our guided forms. AI can help you draft your achievements.
LandingPage.step2Desc: Choose from multiple professional templates. Change colors, typography, and the order of sections in real time.
LandingPage.step3Desc: Export your CV in a perfect, print-ready PDF, without watermarks or weird borders.
LandingPage.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals who have already improved their career opportunities with an impactful resume.
